question_tagalog: Anong trait ko ang tingin mo minsan nagiging toxic na?
question_english: What trait of mine do you think sometimes becomes toxic already?
quote_tagalog: Aayusin natin yung bad habits nang sabay.
quote_english: We will fix our bad habits together.

question_tagalog: Healthy ba sa tingin mo yung boundaries na sine-set natin?
question_english: Do you think the boundaries we set are healthy?
quote_tagalog: Respeto sa isa't isa ang pundasyon natin.
quote_english: Respect for each other is our foundation.

question_tagalog: Pano ko maipapakita sayo na willing akong tanggalin ang toxic traits ko?
question_english: How can I show you I am willing to remove my toxic traits?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong mag-improve araw-araw para satin.
quote_english: I want to improve every day for us.

question_tagalog: Toxic ba pag hinahanapan kita lagi ng update pag magkalayo tayo?
question_english: Is it toxic if I always ask for updates when we're apart?
quote_tagalog: Gusto lang kitang laging safe at okay.
quote_english: I just want you to always be safe and okay.

question_tagalog: Pano natin maiwasan maging gaslighter kapag nag-aaway tayo?
question_english: How do we avoid being gaslighters when we argue?
quote_tagalog: Valid palagi ang feelings mo sa akin.
quote_english: Your feelings are always valid to me.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang mas healthy mag-handle ng conflicts?
question_english: Who between us handles conflicts more healthily?
quote_tagalog: Gusto kong laging peace ang ending natin.
quote_english: I want our ending to always be peace.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ide-describe ang healthy relationship natin sa ibang tao?
question_english: How would you describe our healthy relationship to other people?
quote_tagalog: Tayo yung standard ng tamang pagmamahal.
quote_english: We are the standard of right love.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin noon na akala mo toxic pero hindi pala?
question_english: Was there a part of me before that you thought was toxic but wasn't?
quote_tagalog: Kinikilala natin nang mabuti ang isa't isa.
quote_english: We are getting to know each other well.

question_tagalog: Bakit minsan yung overprotective naging toxic na in a way?
question_english: Why does being overprotective sometimes become toxic in a way?
quote_tagalog: Protektahan kita nang hindi ka nasasakal.
quote_english: I will protect you without suffocating you.

question_tagalog: Pano natin matitimbang ang difference ng clingy and overly attached?
question_english: How do we weigh the difference between clingy and overly attached?
quote_tagalog: Balita palagi ang comfort natin sa isat isa.
quote_english: Our comfort with each other is always balance.

question_tagalog: Ano ang red flag na napansin mo sakin nung ligawan stage pa lang?
question_english: What red flag did you notice in me during the courting stage?
quote_tagalog: Lahat ng green at red flags, mahal ko.
quote_english: All the green and red flags, I love.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na feel that our space is healthy for our individual growth?
question_english: When did you feel that our space is healthy for our individual growth?
quote_tagalog: Kailangan natin parehas minsan ng sariling oras.
quote_english: We both need our own time sometimes.

question_tagalog: Healthy din bang pag usapan ang past to set our boundaries fully?
question_english: Is it also healthy to talk about the past to fully set our boundaries?
quote_tagalog: Tapos na ang nakaraan, focus tayo ngayon.
quote_english: The past is over, let's focus on now.

question_tagalog: May mindset ba ako na unconsciously adds toxicity sa relasyon natin?
question_english: Do I have a mindset that unconsciously adds toxicity to our relationship?
quote_tagalog: Babaguhin natin yung mindset para healthy lang.
quote_english: We'll change the mindset so it's only healthy.

question_tagalog: Sino satin yung madalas mag isip agad ng bad conclusions the fastest?
question_english: Who between us often thinks of bad conclusions the fastest?
quote_tagalog: Wag na tayo mag overthink ng masama.
quote_english: Let's not overthink bad things anymore.

question_tagalog: Pano natin iniiwasang manisi tuwing may pareho tayong kasalanan?
question_english: How do we avoid pointing fingers when we share the blame?
quote_tagalog: Team tayo, hindi tayo magkalaban.
quote_english: We are a team, we are not enemies.

question_tagalog: May tendency ba tayo parehas na mag passive-aggressive pag inis?
question_english: Do we both have a tendency to be passive-aggressive when annoyed?
quote_tagalog: Sabihin natin agad kung may problema.
quote_english: Let's say it directly if there's a problem.

question_tagalog: Healthy ba in the long run yung we let things slide para lang no fight?
question_english: Is it healthy in the long run that we let things slide just for no fight?
quote_tagalog: Pag usapan natin wag lang palampasin.
quote_english: Let's talk about it and not just let it pass.

question_tagalog: Ang manipulation is toxic, nagawa ko na ba sayo iyon unconsciously?
question_english: Manipulation is toxic, have I done that to you unconsciously?
quote_tagalog: Pure love lang ang meron ako sayo.
quote_english: Pure love is all I have for you.

question_tagalog: Healthy ba sa relasyon natin ang frequent pagtatanong of passwords?
question_english: Is frequent asking of passwords healthy in our relationship?
quote_tagalog: Walang tinatago kaya payapa ang puso.
quote_english: Nothing hidden so the heart is peaceful.

question_tagalog: Pano mo inaalis the feeling of controlling kapag pinapayuhan mo ako?
question_english: How do you remove the feeling of controlling when advising me?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko lang yung pinaka-the best sayo.
quote_english: I just want the absolute best for you.

question_tagalog: Pano natin maitatayo ang the safest ground over a toxic environment?
question_english: How can we build the safest ground over a toxic environment?
quote_tagalog: Tayo mismo ang peace in our world.
quote_english: We ourselves are the peace in our world.

question_tagalog: Toxic ba kung the constant need of assurance triggers the anxiety?
question_english: Is it toxic if the constant need of assurance triggers anxiety?
quote_tagalog: Aaraw arawin ko giving assurance sayo mahal.
quote_english: I will give you assurance every day love.

question_tagalog: Ang cold treatment as defense, healthy coping ba iyon sayo minsan?
question_english: Is the cold treatment as defense a healthy coping for you sometimes?
quote_tagalog: Yakapin kita para mawala ang coldness the inside.
quote_english: I'll hug you to remove the coldness inside.

question_tagalog: Kapag nag jojoke ba that crosses the line, how do you handle it healthily?
question_english: When making jokes that cross the line, how do you handle it healthily?
quote_tagalog: Ingatan sana nating the feelings with our words.
quote_english: Let's protect the feelings with our words.

question_tagalog: May part ba sakin that is emotionally demanding the heavy way too much?
question_english: Is there a part of me that is emotionally demanding the heavy way too much?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang to lean on sa the partner mo always.
quote_english: It's okay to lean on your partner always.

question_tagalog: What defines a toxic partner na nakikita mo in other couples na away natin?
question_english: What defines a toxic partner you see in other couples that we don't have?
quote_tagalog: Layo tayo sa kanila, focus on our loving.
quote_english: Let's stay away from them, focus on our loving.

question_tagalog: Healthy paba yung palaging tayo the ones comparing our past loves the current?
question_english: Is it still healthy that we're always the ones comparing our past loves to current?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang ang the future at present life ko.
quote_english: You are my only future and present life.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the absolute green flag ko na overcomes the toxic traits out completely?
question_english: What is my absolute green flag that overcomes the toxic traits out completely?
quote_tagalog: Green flag ka dahil nag go grow ka the more.
quote_english: You're a green flag because you grow more.

question_tagalog: Is keeping scored on fights a really toxic behavior we accidentally do always?
question_english: Is keeping score on fights a really toxic behavior we accidentally do always?
quote_tagalog: Walang bilang of mali kung napatawad of already the past.
quote_english: There's no count of wrongs if forgiven already the past.

question_tagalog: Pano ko the ma ipupursue the healthy conversations without being aggressive the all?
question_english: How can I pursue healthy conversations without being aggressive all?
quote_tagalog: Malumanay ang boses if love prevails the inside.
quote_english: The voice is gentle if love prevails inside.

question_tagalog: Sino satin ang the often na-aapektuhan by toxic people sa the surroundings of work?
question_english: Who between us is often affected by toxic people in the work surroundings?
quote_tagalog: Hayaan mo sila, happy love life naman the atin.
quote_english: Let them be, our love life is happy anyway.

question_tagalog: Healthy ba sa atin the constantly tagging each other anywhere we the totally go?
question_english: Is it healthy for us constantly tagging each other anywhere we totally go?
quote_tagalog: Proud na the proud lang to be yours exclusively.
quote_english: Just super proud to be yours exclusively.

question_tagalog: Toxic the trait ba if we expect each other to read our minds fully the the time?
question_english: Is it a toxic trait if we expect each other to read our minds fully the time?
quote_tagalog: Kakausapin ng clear para the mag ka intindihan always.
quote_english: Will talk clearly to understand each other always.

question_tagalog: Ano ang the most toxic cycle in our relationship we finally broke into fragments?
question_english: What is the most toxic cycle in our relationship we finally broke into fragments?
quote_tagalog: The cycle stops out here para in healthy start slowly.
quote_english: The cycle stops here for a healthy start slowly.

quote_english: Instead of silence we use comforting words always.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang it feels toxic if minsan we don't have enough arguments to make completely?
